case_title: EDWIN ALEXANDER GONZALEZ VS. ADONAY CONSTRUCTION CO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, EDWIN ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT ADONAY CONSTRUCTION CO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP ARIAS, ENRIQUE EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF ADONAY CONSTRUCTION CO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP RAMIREZ, EMILIO ADONAY EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF ADONAY CONSTRUCTION CO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, EDWIN ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADONAY CONSTRUCTION CO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP ARIAS, ENRIQUE EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF ADONAY CONSTRUCTION CO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP RAMIREZ, EMILIO ADONAY EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF ADONAY CONSTRUCTION CO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $6,210.30 PRINCIPAL, $4.38 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,439.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
